title: tricalysia okelensis var. okelensis
intro: Tricalysia okelensis var. okelensis is a plant species of the Rubiaceae family, commonly found in tropical regions. It has been reported to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tricalysia okelensis var. okelensis include its potential in treating various ailments, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. Tricalysia okelensis var. okelensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
